data.title: PPL Corporation reports 2025 earnings; EPS growth 7.1% over 2024. 2026 forecast: $1.90-$1.98 per share; $23B infra investment plan from 2026-2029; Dividend increased to $0.2850 per share.
data.description: In the news article, PPL Corporation reported 2025 earnings at $1.59 per share (GAAP), and earnings from ongoing operations were $1.81 per share, marking a 7.1% growth from 2024. The company projected a 2026 earnings forecast range of $1.90 to $1.98 per share, with a midpoint of $1.94 per share, representing a 7.2% growth over 2025 ongoing earnings. PPL extended its annual EPS growth target of 6% to 8% through 2029 and updated capital plans to $23 billion for infrastructure investments by 2029, aiming for an average annual rate base growth of around 10.3%. Quarterly common stock dividend increased to $0.2850 per share. Additionally, the company highlighted operational efficiencies, investment strategies, and growth opportunities in various segments to achieve sustainable energy solutions. PPL aims to ensure utility bills remain affordable while focusing on utility advancements and customer programs. The company's strong performance and strategic initiatives are positioning it well for future growth and shareholder returns.

data.title: Fidelity National Financial (NYSE: FNF) declares $0.52 quarterly dividend per share of common stock; payable on March 31, 2026.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida on February 20, 2026, Fidelity National Financial, Inc. (NYSE: FNF) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.52 per share for its common stock. This dividend is set to be paid out on March 31, 2026, to stockholders of the company.

data.title: Array's 2025 results & 2026 guidance announced in teleconference on Feb 20, 2026 at 9am CST, available on investors.arrayinc.com.
data.description: Array has released its 2026 guidance, with a scheduled teleconference on February 20, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. CST. The call can be accessed live through the Events & Presentations page on investors.arrayinc.com. Array Digital Infrastructure, IncSM will provide important details during this event.

data.title: TDS reports strong financial results for 2025, sets goal of 2.1M fiber service addresses. Teleconference on Feb. 20th at 9:00am CST.
data.description: TDS Telecom has raised its target for marketable fiber service to 2.1 million addresses, as revealed in their 2026 guidance alongside Array. A teleconference is scheduled for February 20, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. CST to elaborate on this development.

data.title: TDS declares first quarter 2026 dividends for Common and Preferred Shares on NYSE: TDS.
data.description: Chicago-based Telephone and Data Systems, Inc. (NYSE: TDS) recently announced the declaration of their first quarter 2026 dividends across several share classes, including Common Shares, Series A Common Shares, Series UU Preferred Shares, and Series VV Preferred Shares. TDS is set to pay these dividends on a quarterly basis.

data.title: F&G Annuities & Life declares $0.25 quarterly dividend per common share, payable on March 31, 2026.
data.description: In Des Moines, Iowa, on February 20, 2026, F&G Annuities & Life, Inc. (NYSE: FG) disclosed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per common share. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on March 31, 2026, to shareholders of the company.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs lose $166M amid BTC's worst yearly start in 2026, with $2.7B outflow YTD.
data.description: Bitcoin ETFs have experienced nearly five weeks of consecutive outflows, with losses totaling $2.7 billion year-to-date. The year 2026 is pointing towards one of the worst starts for Bitcoin in recent times.

data.title: Approved Oil Co. reports success of renewable diesel in NYC during severe winter after 65 years.
data.description: In Brooklyn, New York on February 20, 2026, Approved Oil Company of Brooklyn, Inc. announced the effective use of renewable diesel (RD) supplied to New York City agencies during a harsh winter period. This winter was among the most severe in over 65 years.

data.title: Balchem (NASDAQ: BCPC) beat estimated Q4 earnings by 2.34%, reporting EPS of $1.31 vs. $1.28 estimate. Revenue up $23.61M.
data.description: Balchem Corporation (NASDAQ: BCPC) recently released its Q4 earnings on February 20, 2026, at 07:12 AM. The disclosed report revealed that they surpassed estimated earnings by 2.34%, posting an EPS of $1.31 compared to the estimated $1.28. Additionally, their revenue saw a significant increase of $23.61 million from the previous year. This demonstrates notable growth in both earnings and revenue for the company. In terms of earnings history, Balchem has consistently outperformed expectations, surpassing EPS estimates by $0.02. For more detailed information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Eli Lilly's Omvoh treatment for Crohn's disease shows 92.4% clinical remission in Phase 3 study, reducing hospitalizations by nearly half.
data.description: Eli Lilly's treatment for Crohn's disease, Omvoh, has shown promising long-term results with over 90% of patients maintaining steroid-free remission for three years. Data from Phase 3 trials showed clinical remission rates of 92.4% and corticosteroid-free rates of 91.2%. In the VIVID-1 study, Crohn's disease-related hospitalizations and surgeries were significantly reduced with Omvoh compared to a placebo. Similarly, the LUCENT-3 study showed minimal hospitalizations and surgeries in Ulcerative colitis patients treated with Omvoh. These results position Omvoh as the only IL-23p19 inhibitor demonstrating durable efficacy over extended periods. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Kane Biotech's revyve® Wound Gel article published in International Wound Journal by Dr. Jeyachchandran Visvalingam et al.
data.description: Kane Biotech Inc. (TSX-V: KNE) based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, disclosed the release of a featured piece regarding its revyve® Antimicrobial wound gel in the International Wound Journal on February 20, 2026. The article, titled "Wound Healing Property of a Novel Thermo-Reversible Wound Gel With Lasting Antimicrobial and Antibiofilm Activity," is led by Dr. Jeyachandran Visvalingam, Internal R&D Leader at Kane. Additionally, contributors from the Miller School of Medicine, specifically from the Dr. Phillip Frost Department of Dermatology & Cutaneous Surgery at the University of Miami, are part of the publication.

data.title: Cardiac surgeons at Allegheny General Hospital are first in the region to perform a successful transcatheter tricuspid valve replacement.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 20, 2026, specialists in cardiology at Allegheny General Hospital, part of Allegheny Health Network (AHN), revealed their achievement of being the inaugural in the area and among the pioneering in the state to effectively execute a transcatheter procedure on the tricuspid valve.

data.title: Mars & AMERICAN HERITAGE® Chocolate award $52,800 in Chocolate History Grants at annual meeting.
data.description: Washington, D.C. - Mars and AMERICAN HERITAGE® Chocolate recently marked two decades of backing American history establishments at the Heritage Chocolate Society Gala Dinner. During the event, they granted a total of $52,800 to aid research efforts, with six organizations benefiting from this support.
